name: md-context-injector
description: Inject full file paths for LLM work

commands.title: LLM Context: Insert Workspace Relative Path

mdContextInjector.useDefaultExcludes.description: Whether to include the built-in default exclude patterns (node_modules, .git, build, dist, .next, coverage, Flutter/iOS/Android folders, etc.). Disable to fully control the exclude list yourself via `mdContextInjector.excludePatterns`.

mdContextInjector.excludePatterns.markdownDescription:
Additional glob patterns to exclude from the `@` file picker. These are merged with the built-in defaults unless `#mdContextInjector.useDefaultExcludes#` is `false`.

Examples:
- `**/*.lock`
- `**/tmp/**`
- `**/__snapshots__/**`

scripts.pretest: yarn run compile-tests && yarn run compile && yarn run lint
